calendar.matters:
Petition For Order Confirming Trust Assets
Off Calendar Dec-18-2018 Off Calendar

Petition For Order Confirming Trust Instrument; Invalidating Power Of Appointment; And For Confirmation Of Paul Walker And Heather Sprague As Co-Trustees
Off Calendar Dec-18-2018 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Phillip Campbell for Paul Walker.
Amanda Ebey for Heather Sprague.

The Court questions venue. Mr. Campbell stated that at the time the petition was filed the Co-Trustee was living in San Francisco and that the Co-Trustee now has moved into an asset of Trust that is across the Bay. Ms. Ebey stated that her Client is not moving again, that her Client has been fixing up the house for the purpose of living there and that she thinks they all agree that venue is in Alameda County. Ms. Ebey also stated that they have a probate for Willard in Alameda County, that her Client lives there and that there is no connection with San Francisco. The Petition for Order Confirming Trust Instrument, etc. is off calendar. The Petition for Order Confirming Trust Assets (Heggstad Petition) on calendar for January 29, 2018 is also off calendar.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Choi. Not reported.

Petition For Order Confirming Trust Instrument; Invalidating Power Of Appointment; And For Confirmation Of Paul Walker And Heather Sprague As Co-Trustees
Off Calendar Dec-04-2018 Continued To Dec-18-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
